exercises.title: Implement Diffusion
exercises.description: Implement the diffusion operator D = 2|s⟩⟨s| - I and verify it reflects about the mean.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def diffusion(n_qubits):
    """Create diffusion operator."""
    # Your code here
    pass

# Test: verify reflection property
D = diffusion(2)
state = np.array([0.6, 0.4, 0.5, 0.5]) / np.linalg.norm([0.6, 0.4, 0.5, 0.5])
reflected = D @ state

print(f"Original: {np.round(state, 4)}")
print(f"Mean: {np.mean(state):.4f}")
print(f"Reflected: {np.round(reflected, 4)}")
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def diffusion(n_qubits):
    """Create diffusion operator."""
    N = 2**n_qubits
    s = np.ones(N) / np.sqrt(N)
    return 2 * np.outer(s, s) - np.eye(N)

D = diffusion(2)
state = np.array([0.6, 0.4, 0.5, 0.5])
state = state / np.linalg.norm(state)
reflected = D @ state

print(f"Original: {np.round(state, 4)}")
print(f"Mean: {np.mean(state):.4f}")
print(f"Reflected: {np.round(reflected, 4)}")
print(f"Verify: 2*mean - original ≈ reflected")

exercises.title: Circuit Form
exercises.description: Implement D using H^⊗n and (2|0⟩⟨0| - I).
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def diffusion_circuit(n_qubits):
    """D = H^n · (2|0⟩⟨0| - I) · H^n"""
    # Your code here
    pass

D1 = diffusion_circuit(2)
D2 = 2 * np.outer(np.ones(4)/2, np.ones(4)/2) - np.eye(4)
print("Circuit matches direct:", np.allclose(D1, D2))
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def diffusion_circuit(n_qubits):
    """D = H^n · (2|0⟩⟨0| - I) · H^n"""
    N = 2**n_qubits
    
    H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]])/np.sqrt(2)
    H_all = H
    for _ in range(n_qubits - 1):
        H_all = np.kron(H_all, H)
    
    phase = -np.eye(N)
    phase[0,0] = 1
    
    return H_all @ phase @ H_all

D1 = diffusion_circuit(2)
D2 = 2 * np.outer(np.ones(4)/2, np.ones(4)/2) - np.eye(4)
print("Circuit matches direct:", np.allclose(D1, D2))
